prompt: The global @rladies account got tagged in two posts today: one is a chapter's upcoming in-person meetup, the other is a job posting at a tech company. Should we repost either of them? What's our policy here?
assertions: Says do NOT retweet in-person/local chapter events from the global account
Says do NOT retweet job postings
Suggests passing the job to the community Slack jobs channel, ideally with a no-endorsement note
Explains the account amplifies past events (with photos/links) and online events instead
Mentions the account is R-focused / not a Q&A account
Notes controversial or sensitive posts get leadership review
